title: Per-section item count
question: How is the number of decisions in each list section shown?
rationale: Show each section's count inline, in parentheses right after the name and in the same font — 'Design (7)'. Chosen over the earlier far-right muted number, which read as a detached stat and sat awkwardly once headers became collapsible (d31); folding it into the heading keeps it tied to the name.

options.label: Inline in parentheses, in the heading font — 'Design (7)'

tradeoffs.note: the count belongs to the name instead of floating away from it
stays right by the title in a folded header (d31)

options.label: Smaller muted number on the far right of the header

tradeoffs.note: counts line up down the right edge
detaches from the name; awkward next to the collapse caret
no quick read of how many sit under each phase
